prompt: What is the first name of the only Malko Competition recipient from the 20th Century (after 1977) whose nationality on record is a country that no longer exists?
actual:
The first name is **Claus**.

The Malko Competition recipient in question is **Claus Peter Flor**, who won the competition in 1983. His recorded nationality is **East Germany** (German Democratic Republic), a country that no longer exists (it ceased to exist in 1990 upon German reunification). He is the only Malko Competition recipient after 1977 within the 20th century whose nationality on record is a defunct country.
